title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Queen, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Yamato as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The strong are silent in action!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: THE WAY YOU SPAWN IS ANYING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Queen!! Why are we also getting dragged into this? Gya- hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DAHAHA!! It's cold... so cold!!! I'll turn into a demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pleasures!! Laughing is all you are good at!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't touch them!! Fend them off with your weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These demons blindly attack allies and enemies alike.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rather than hurting my comrades I'll prefer to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't be SO RASH! YOU FOOL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "I don't want to become a demon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There should be a way to cure it!! When all hope is lost...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will cut you down without hesitation!! Don't hasten your death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We both joined this pirate crew together, didn't we!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is way too cruel master queen!! You're involving our comrades in this too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: making a drug and going around infecting it into all the demons, in the midst of battle,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, unlike at UDOW, the Mastermind that created the virus...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Is here, right now in this place!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The creator of this virus will surely have made an antibody,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So he should have it on him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we could get our hands on that,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can produce it in large quantities!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of all people, it had to be an ALL STAR...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to pull it off would be a daunting task!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
